_comment: Shona Wordle wordlist. 'answers' is the rotating daily pool (every entry MUST be a real, commonly-used Shona word verified by a Shona speaker). 'valid' is the larger pool a player may TYPE without being told it isn't a word; it includes everything in 'answers' plus more. Both lists are exactly 6 ASCII a-z letters. Digraphs (nh, mh, vh, sv, dz, bv) are treated as their component letters per Wordle convention.
_curator_notes: MVP starter pool, May 2026. The pool will grow steadily once a Shona-speaking curator reviews and extends it. Bug reports and additions: news@mutapatimes.com.
